title: Lightly Crispy Lombard Rye Flatbread
description: A yeasty and crispy Italian flatbread featuring rye, perfect for a weeknight dinner, with a macrobiotic-friendly twist
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit with a baking stone inside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough on a lightly floured surface and roll it out into a thin sheet.
Transfer the dough to the preheated baking stone and brush with olive oil.
Sprinkle rosemary and sea salt over the dough.
Bake the flatbread for 15-20 minutes or until it is lightly crispy and golden brown.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing.
